title: Be Verb
tagline: Am, Is, Are, Was, Were — English की सबसे ज़रूरी Verb!
summary: Be verb (am/is/are/was/were) English की सबसे fundamental verb है। इसके बिना कोई sentence पूरा नहीं होता। 'I am a teacher', 'She is happy', 'They are ready', 'He was late', 'We were tired' — ये सब be verb से बनते हैं। आज हम be verb के हर form को पूरी तरह master करेंगे — positive, negative, questions, और contractions।
hindiSummary: हिंदी में हम कहते हैं 'मैं छात्र हूँ, वह खुश है, हम तैयार हैं' — इन सभी में 'हूँ, है, हैं' be verb है। English में इसी को 'am, is, are' कहते हैं। Past में यही 'was, were' बन जाता है। यह verb आपको पूरी life काम आएगी।
whatYouWillLearn: Contractions: I'm, He's, She's, It's, We're, You're, They're
Negative: I'm not, He isn't, They aren't, I wasn't, They weren't
Questions: Am I? Is he? Are they? Was I? Were they?
Short answers: Yes, I am. / No, he isn't. / Yes, they were.
Be verb for identity: 'I am a doctor.'
Be verb for description: 'She is beautiful.'
Be verb for location: 'He is in Delhi.'
Be verb for state/emotion: 'They are tired.'
Be verb for occupation: 'We are engineers.'
Be verb for nationality: 'I am Indian.'
whyImportant: Be verb के बिना English impossible है। यह हर tense में use होती है — Simple Present, Past, Continuous, Passive Voice, everywhere. इसे perfect करना बाकी सब grammar को आसान बना देता है।
realLifeUsage: Introduction: 'I am Rahul. I am a software engineer.'
Status update: 'I am busy right now. Are you free?'
Description: 'The office is on the 5th floor.'
Emotion: 'I am very excited about this project.'
Past: 'I was in a meeting. She was not available.'
Question: 'Are you the new joinee? Were you in the last team?'
Negative: 'I am not interested in this role.'
Location: 'The file is on my desk.'
Weather: 'It is very hot today. Yesterday was cooler.'
Age: 'I am 25 years old. She was 30 when she got promoted.'

dailyGoal.morning: Memorize the complete Be Verb table (am/is/are/was/were) — 30 min
dailyGoal.evening: Make 20 sentences describing yourself and people around you (20 min)
dailyGoal.night: Write 10 sentences about yesterday using was/were (15 min)

motivationalQuote: You are what you repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act but a habit. — Aristotle

practiceTarget.speakingTarget: Describe 5 people around you using be verb
practiceTarget.writingTarget: Write 10 present and 10 past sentences using be verb
